name: FTAI Aviation Ltd.
business: FTAI Aviation Ltd. is an independent engine maintenance platform focused on CFM56-5B, CFM56-7B and V2500 aircraft engines. It repairs and rebuilds engines at its maintenance facilities and through joint ventures, selling or leasing them to airlines and asset owners worldwide via its Maintenance, Repair and Exchange (MRE) model. The company also owns and manages a portfolio of aircraft and engines through its Aviation Leasing segment and has launched a Strategic Capital Initiative to manage third-party capital.

exposures.sentence: We repair and rebuild engines in our maintenance facilities and with our joint venture partners, and sell or lease the engines to airlines and asset owners around the world.
On December 30, 2025, the Company announced the launch of FTAI Power, a platform focused on converting CFM56 engines to power turbines.
